# Lism CSS

> Lism CSS is a lightweight, layout-first CSS framework for rapidly building the structural skeleton of websites. No build step required — just import the CSS. It also provides dedicated React and Astro components via npm.

- GitHub: https://github.com/lism-css/lism-css
- npm: `lism-css` (core CSS + React components), `@lism-css/astro` (Astro components), `@lism-css/ui` (UI components)
- License: MIT

## Getting Started

- [Overview](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/overview/): An overview of Lism CSS and its key features.
- [Installation](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/installation/): Learn how to install Lism CSS and get started with the basics.
- [Changelog](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/changelog/): A log of all notable changes and updates across Lism CSS releases.

## Core Concepts

- [CSS Methodology](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/css-methodology/): An overview of the CSS layer structure and class design methodology behind Lism CSS.
- [Design Tokens](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/tokens/): A reference of all design tokens in Lism CSS, including colors, spacing, and shadows.
- [Color Tokens](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/tokens/colors/): A reference of semantic colors and palette color tokens defined in Lism CSS, along with customization examples.
- [Typography Tokens](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/tokens/typography/): An overview of typography design tokens in Lism CSS, including font-family, font-size, line-height, and more.
- [Spacing Tokens](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/tokens/spacing/): An overview of Fibonacci-based spacing tokens in Lism CSS and which prop classes support them.
- [Base Styles](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/base-styles/): Learn about the Reset CSS and HTML element base styles defined in the @lism-base layer.
- [Reset CSS](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/reset-css/): Learn about the lightweight Reset CSS provided by Lism CSS and how to load it.
- [Prop Responsive](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/responsive/): Learn how Lism CSS handles responsive design with breakpoint classes and variables.
- [Customize](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/customize/): Learn how to customize Lism CSS by overriding SCSS variables and toggling @layer.

## CSS Classes

- [Set Class](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/set-class/): Learn about the set-- utility classes for overriding base styles and redefining tokens.
- [Module Class](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/module-class/): An overview of Lism CSS module classes (is--, l--, a--, c--) and their usage.
- [Utility Class](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/utility-class/): Learn about the utility classes in Lism CSS that apply bundled styles and decorations.
- [Prop Class](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/prop-class/): A complete list of Prop Classes that map to CSS properties, with usage examples.

## Core Components

- [Group](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/core-components/Group/): A Lism component that outputs a <div> tag.
- [Heading](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/core-components/Heading/): A Lism component that outputs heading tags (<h1> to <h6>).
- [Inline](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/core-components/Inline/): A Lism component that outputs a <span> tag.
- [Link](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/core-components/Link/): A Lism component that outputs an <a> tag.
- [Lism](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/core-components/Lism/): A general-purpose component that accepts a wide variety of props aligned with the Lism CSS design system.
- [List & ListItem](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/core-components/List/): Lism components that output list tags (<ul>, <li>).
- [Text](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/core-components/Text/): A Lism component that outputs a <p> tag.

## State Modules

- [Container](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/is--container/): Documentation for the Container module in Lism CSS. A component that sets container-type to enable container queries.
- [Layer](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/is--layer/): Documentation for the Layer module in Lism CSS. A component for creating overlay layers positioned over a parent element.
- [LinkBox](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/is--linkBox/): Documentation for the LinkBox module in Lism CSS. A component that makes an entire box clickable as a link.
- [Wrapper](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/is--wrapper/): Documentation for the Wrapper module in Lism CSS. A component that outputs the is--wrapper class to control content width.

## Layout Modules

- [Box](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--box/): Documentation for the Box module in Lism CSS. A simple layout module for grouping content without specific layout behavior.
- [Center](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--center/): Documentation for the Center module in Lism CSS. A layout module for centering elements both horizontally and vertically.
- [Cluster](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--cluster/): Documentation for the Cluster module in Lism CSS. A layout module that arranges elements horizontally with automatic wrapping.
- [Columns](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--columns/): Documentation for the Columns module in Lism CSS. A column layout that displays content in a specified number of columns per breakpoint.
- [Flex](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--flex/): Documentation for the Flex module in Lism CSS. A layout module for arranging content using Flexbox.
- [Flow](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--flow/): Documentation for the Flow module in Lism CSS. A flow-root layout module that automatically manages spacing between child elements.
- [FluidCols](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--fluidcols/): Documentation for the FluidCols module in Lism CSS. A breakpoint-independent column layout with automatic wrapping based on minimum column width.
- [Frame](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--frame/): Documentation for the Frame module in Lism CSS. A layout module that scales child media elements to fit its own size.
- [Grid](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--grid/): Documentation for the Grid module in Lism CSS. A layout module for arranging content using CSS Grid.
- [SideMain](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--sidemain/): Documentation for the SideMain module in Lism CSS. A two-column layout that switches between side-main and single-column without media queries.
- [Stack](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--stack/): Documentation for the Stack module in Lism CSS. A layout module that arranges elements vertically using Flexbox.
- [SwitchCols](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--switchcols/): Documentation for the SwitchCols module in Lism CSS. A layout that switches between multi-column and single-column without media queries.

## Atomic Modules

- [Decorator](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/a--decorator/): Documentation for the Decorator module in Lism CSS. A component that outputs an empty decorative element with aria-hidden.
- [Divider](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/a--divider/): Documentation for the Divider module in Lism CSS. A component that renders a dividing line between content sections.
- [Icon](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/a--icon/): Documentation for the Icon module in Lism CSS. A component for rendering SVG icon elements with preset and custom icon support.
- [Media](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/core-components/Media/): A Lism component for outputting media elements such as images and videos.
- [Spacer](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/a--spacer/): Documentation for the Spacer module in Lism CSS. Outputs an empty element to reserve space between content.

## UI Components

- [Accordion](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Accordion/): Documentation for the Accordion component provided by @lism-css/ui.
- [Alert](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Alert/): Documentation for the Alert component provided by @lism-css/ui.
- [Avatar](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Avatar/): Documentation for the Avatar component provided by @lism-css/ui.
- [Badge](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Badge/): Documentation for the Badge component provided by @lism-css/ui.
- [Button](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Button/): Documentation for the Button component provided by @lism-css/ui.
- [Callout](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Callout/): Documentation for the Callout component provided by @lism-css/ui.
- [Chat](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Chat/): Documentation for the Chat component provided by @lism-css/ui.
- [Details](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Details/): Documentation for the Details component provided by @lism-css/ui.
- [Modal](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Modal/): Documentation for the Modal component provided by @lism-css/ui.
- [NavMenu](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/NavMenu/): Documentation for the NavMenu component provided by @lism-css/ui.
- [ShapeDivider](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/ShapeDivider/): Documentation for the ShapeDivider component provided by @lism-css/ui.
- [Tabs](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Tabs/): Documentation for the Tabs component provided by @lism-css/ui.

## Optional

- [Banner](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/examples/Banner/): Example implementation of banner link patterns using Lism CSS.
- [Breadcrumb](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/examples/Breadcrumb/): Example implementation of breadcrumb navigation using Lism CSS.
- [Card](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/examples/Card/): Example implementation of card-style content layouts using Lism CSS.
- [DividerLabel](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/examples/DividerLabel/): Example implementation of a labeled divider component using Lism CSS.
- [FAQ](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/examples/FAQ/): Example implementation of FAQ (Q&A) layouts using Lism CSS.
- [Hero](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/examples/Hero/): Example implementation of hero content sections using Lism CSS.
- [Reel](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/examples/Reel/): Example implementation of a horizontally scrollable reel component using Lism CSS.
- [Steps](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/examples/Steps/): Example implementation of step-by-step procedural layouts using Lism CSS.
- [Timeline](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/examples/Timeline/): Example implementation of a timeline layout using Lism CSS.
- [Props: -bd](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/props/bd/): How to use the -bd prop classes and related CSS variables for border styling.
- [Props: -hov](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/props/hov/): How to use the -hov prop classes for controlling hover behavior and transitions.
- [Props: -max-sz](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/props/max-sz/): How to use the -max-sz utility classes for controlling the maximum inline size of content.
- [DummyText](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/DummyText/): A component for outputting dummy text for prototyping and design mockups.
- [DummyImage](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/DummyImage/): A component for outputting a dummy placeholder image.
